all: serial pgen

serial: serial.c
        $(CC) $(CFLAGS) -o serial serial.c

pgen: pgen.upc
        $(UPC) $(UPCFLAGS) -o pgen pgen.upc

clean:
        rm -f serial pgen /app/serial.out /app/pgen_*.out
EOF
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y build-essential wget perl m4
wget -q https://upc.lbl.gov/download/release/berkeley_upc-2022.10.0.tar.gz -O /tmp/berkeley_upc-2022.10.0.tar.gz
cd /tmp && rm -rf berkeley_upc-2022.10.0 && tar xf berkeley_upc-2022.10.0.tar.gz && cd berkeley_upc-2022.10.0 && ./configure --prefix=/usr/local --disable-mpi -
-enable-smp --disable-ibv --disable-shmem --disable-ofi --disable-ucx
make -j2
make install
export PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH
upcc -version || which upcc
